creator: shigio@tamacom.com
text:
I have released GLOBAL-3.56 which is a bug fix version of 3.55.
	It is available at:
		http://www.tamacom.com/global/global-3.56.tar.gz

        [fixed]
        global.conf
                - GTAGS entry for Exuberant Ctags fixed.
        htags.pl- couldn't treat paths which include '+' character.

                Thanks to Masahiro Fujiwara for his bug report and patch.

        htags.pl- shut a security hole.
        global  - couldn't print object at line 1.
        btreeop.1, global.1, htags.1
                - syntax error fixed. (missing .El)
        [changed]
        nvi-1.79.diff, nvi-1.66.diff
                - put into the public domain.
        java.h, Cpp.h
                - MAXCLASSSTACK(max size of stack) changed from 10 to 100.

	Thanks.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
